turning_point.snippet: Hi Melinda,  Kanak here! As we discussed yesterday, I've got our meeting set up for now and I'm waiting for you on the call.    Here's the meeting link: meet.google.com/rsr-rdgo-afy    Looking forward to chatting with you!

signals.snippet: Hi Melinda,  Kanak here! As we discussed yesterday, I've got our meeting set up for now and I'm waiting for you on the call.    Here's the meeting link: meet.google.com/rsr-rdgo-afy    Looking forward to chatting with you!

I genuinely want to talk with you and see how things are going with your business. Just let me know when you have about 15-20 minutes free, and I'll make sure to call you at a time that works best for you.

signals.last_msg_before: Hi, this is Melinda. I'm not available right now, but if you leave your name and your number, I'll return a call if necessary.

cause_analysis.narrative: Nutri-Sculpt LLC churned on 2026-02-02 after 240 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2025-12-16 (sms) — first complaint keyword: "waiting for". Classification: competitive switch. The client mentioned an alternative provider before cancelling.
recommendations: [Competitive] Client mentioned a competitor on 2025-12-19 — log this to Product + Sales for competitive positioning work.
